duplicates.title: Weekly Surge In Travelmobility Google Trends Searches For Road Trip Signals Bullish Xly

duplicate_of.matched_title: travel mobility weekly increase in google trends for road trip searches signals leisure travel pickup

idea.title: Weekly Surge In Travelmobility Google Trends Searches For Road Trip Signals Bullish Xly
idea.thesis: Rising interest in road trips signals increased consumer discretionary travel spending potential. More road trips increase discretionary spending on travel-related goods and services.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'road trip'
idea.signal_logic: If weekly search interest rises more than 20% week-over-week
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If weekly search interest rises more than 20% week-over-week Exit: After 4 weeks or if interest drops below baseline
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest for 'road trip' via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal and event-driven travel trends cause frequent interest spikes.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in travel_mobility Google Trends searches for 'road trip' signals bullish XLY

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'road trip'

schema.behavior: Rising interest in road trips signals increased consumer discretionary travel spending potential.

market_impact.rationale: More road trips increase discretionary spending on travel-related goods and services.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest rises more than 20% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if interest drops below baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal and event-driven travel trends cause frequent interest spikes.

duplicates.title: Weekly Increase In Macroinputpressure Fred Series For Producer Price Index Signals Bearish Xlb

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly surge in fred series for producer price index ppi signals bearish xlb

idea.title: Weekly Increase In Macroinputpressure Fred Series For Producer Price Index Signals Bearish Xlb
idea.thesis: Rising producer prices increase input costs for materials companies, pressuring margins and stock performance. Higher input inflation squeezes materials sector profitability.
data_sources: FRED weekly Producer Price Index (PPI) data
idea.signal_logic: If weekly PPI increases more than 0.5% week-over-week
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If weekly PPI increases more than 0.5% week-over-week Exit: After 3 weeks or if PPI growth slows below 0.1%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use FRED weekly Producer Price Index (PPI) data via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI data is regularly updated and exhibits frequent moderate changes.

schema.idea: Weekly increase in macro_input_pressure FRED series for Producer Price Index signals bearish XLB

data.source: FRED weekly Producer Price Index (PPI) data

schema.behavior: Rising producer prices increase input costs for materials companies, pressuring margins and stock performance.

market_impact.rationale: Higher input inflation squeezes materials sector profitability.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly PPI increases more than 0.5% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if PPI growth slows below 0.1%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI data is regularly updated and exhibits frequent moderate changes.
